title: Sonik Herox HERO-X FRS fishing Free spool carp coarse Reel
description: Description The HEROX FRS 8000 and 10000 models are designed for reliability and tough fishing conditions. Ideal for anglers who prefer a dual drag free spool reel with a large line capacity. Featuring a micro-adjust rear drag system for ultra-smooth line release and quick, positive disengagement with a simple turn of the reel handle. The wormshaft transmission ensures perfect line lay and the floating rotor line guard helps prevent tangles. Surprisingly lightweight for its size, this reel retrieves over one meter of line per turn! High-impact captive line clips enhance your accuracy and our quick torque drag system ensures you stay in control when it matters most. title: Wychwood Riot 9ft 2.75lb AR Shrink Carp Fishing Rod
description: Free Leeda Rogue Rod Holdall – Yours When You Buy 3+ Wychwood Rods! Order any 3 Wychwood rods and receive a free Rod Holdall worth £29.99. Exclusive to members – but don’t worry, membership is completely free and takes seconds to join. Click here to Sign up , claim your free holdall, and upgrade your kit in style! Riot Carp Rod Range The Riot range of carp rods delivers outstanding performance with the sleek, understated styling normally found only on premium-priced rods. Designed with major technological improvements in weight, balance, diameter and controllable power, the Riot range offers a refined feel with serious capability. The high-modulus 24T carbon blank features a satin black, non-reflective finish for a subtle, low-key look. This blends seamlessly into the premium 1K carbon reinforced section and machined 1K carbon line clip, leading into a durable black DPS screw-lock reel seat with gloss black collars. The Japanese shrink-wrapped handle is hard-wearing, easy to clean and ultra-stylish, with a subtle flared butt for improved grip and control when it matters most. A gun-smoke laser-etched butt cap completes the finish. Performance & Guides All 12ft and 13ft models feature 50mm ULW (Ultra-Light-Weight) guides to enhance responsiveness, recovery speed and casting performance. Oversized 16mm anti-frap tip guides help eliminate crack-offs, frap-ups and weed jams — giving you more confidence and improved casting accuracy. The Riot Carp Rod range is available in two dedicated playing and casting actions: AR (All-Rounder) Offers the best of both worlds — a forgiving tip and mid-section with plenty of power in reserve through the butt. XD (Extra Distance) A faster action focused on powerful casting. Ideal for long-range work and solid bag fishing, with a stiffer mid and butt section for maximum power and a crisp, responsive tip. Key Features High Modulus 24T Carbon blank 50mm ULW casting-efficient guides (12ft/13ft models) 16mm Anti-Frap tip guide Robust DPS ree

title: Crafty Catcher Big Hit Pop Ups 15mm 35g All Flavours
description: Boasting incredible value and exceptional buoyancy, these highly attractive, bright and needle-friendly pop-ups will give a competitive edge to any angler. With an array of irresistible flavours that fish simply can’t resist, these pop-ups are your secret weapon for landing the big ones! Perfectly designed to complement Crafty Catchers' range of Big Hit Boilies, these pop-ups shine when fished together, creating a bait combination that’s hard to ignore. Plus, as single hook baits during the colder months, they prove to be just what you need when fish are a bit more finicky. Versatile, vibrant, and ready to make a splash, these bait beauties promise to elevate your fishing game to a whole new level. Get ready, anglers—those carp won’t know what hit 'em! Pop ups are one of the most reliable carp rigs going and the Crafty Catcher Big Hit Pop Ups are a solid, affordable option that consistently produces results. Bright, buoyant and available in a great range of flavours, these are a staple in any carp angler's tackle bag. At Voyagers Hook we recommend pairing them with the matching boilie dip for maximum attraction.

title: Inline Method Carp Fishing Feeder 24g
description: 24g Inline Method Feeder Fishing Weight Get ready to revolutionise your fishing game with our 24g Inline Method Feeder Fishing Weight. Designed specifically for those stealthy carp and coarse lake fishing sessions, this sleek little beauty is engineered for precision and performance. Features: Perfectly Balanced : Weighing in at 24g, it provides the ideal heft for casting accuracy, ensuring your bait lands right where the fish are lurking. Inline Design : The inline setup minimises resistance, making it easier for the fish to take the bait without feeling any weight – it’s like a buffet experience for those carp! Durable Material : Crafted from high-quality materials that can withstand the tests of time and the great outdoors, this feeder is ready for whatever the lake throws at you. Universal Compatibility : Fits seamlessly with a variety of other tackle, whether you're a seasoned pro or just dipping your toes into the world of coarse fishing. Benefits: Improved Bite Detection : The inline design allows for more sensitive connections, giving you a better chance of detecting those delicate bites. Versatile Use : Whether you're fishing in lakes, rivers or ponds, this method feeder is the perfect companion for various fishing techniques and bait types. Less Snags, More Swag : The streamlined shape reduces the likelihood of snags, letting you spend less time messing around and more time enjoying the catch of the day. Conclusion: Elevate your fishing experience and enhance your chances of landing that trophy carp with the 24g Inline Method Feeder Fishing Weight. Trust us; the fish won’t know what hit them! Get ready to reel in the compliments, and maybe a few big ones too!

title: Inline Small Flat Pear Ledger Weight 2oz
description: Inline 2oz Ledger Flat Pear Weight Introducing our Inline 2oz Ledger Flat Pear Weight – the perfect companion for your fishing escapades! Designed for those who appreciate the finer quirks of the angling art, this weight combines functionality with a touch of charm. Crafted with a streamlined, pear shape, it slices through the water with grace, allowing your bait to settle just where you want it. Whether you're targeting that elusive carp or luring in a feisty perch, this 2oz weight ensures your line stays steady and your catch stays keen. The inline design means less tangling and more time reeling in the big one. And, let’s face it, the distinctive flat profile not only looks fantastic but also taps into the age-old tradition of keeping things uncomplicated—just like our great-grandad would have wanted! With our Inline Flat Pear Weight, you’ll find it easier to cast longer distances, even when the breeze tries to throw a spanner in the works. Designed to pair perfectly with a variety of rigs, this trusty little weight is bound to become a staple in your tackle box. So, gear up, embrace the quirks of fishing, and get ready to make your next fishing trip legendary. With our Inline 2oz Ledger Flat Pear Weight in hand, you’ll be one step closer to reeling in the catch of the day!

title: Flat Pear Distance Ledger Casting Weight
description: When it comes to flat pear ledger weights, distance is not just a number—it's an art form in the fishing dance! These nifty little nuggets of lead allow anglers to cast their lines further and with precision. The unique flat shape helps to keep the weight planted firmly on the bed, making them ideal for ledgering. Generally speaking, the distance you can achieve with a flat pear ledger depends on a few key factors: the weight of the ledger itself, the type of rod and reel you’re using, and your overall casting technique. If you’re using a classic 3 oz flat pear ledger, you may comfortably reach distances of 30-50 yards, but don't be surprised if a little practice pushes you beyond that magical line! If you're fishing in calm waters, you might find yourself launching into the stratosphere with your casts. In contrast, if you’re dealing with gusty winds or rough waters, your distance could be affected. So, it’s a matter of combo: match your flat pear ledger weight with the right rod action and a swoosh of finesse, and you’re all set to send your bait soaring into the great beyond. Remember, practice makes perfect! Get out there with your trusted flat pear leads and see just how far you can cast your dreams (and hopefully catch a few fish while you’re at it).
tags: weight, lead, pear, carp, fishing, angling, tackle, casting, river, coarse, lake

title: Tournament Zip Distance lead weights 2.5oz
description: Tournament Zip Lead 2.5oz Get ready to enhance your rig with the Tournament Zip Lead 2.5oz! Designed for those who demand precision and performance, this lead is your perfect companion for tournament fishing. With its sleek streamline shape, it slices through water effortlessly to reach the sweet spot faster than you can say "cast away!" Crafted with durability in mind, the 2.5oz weight ensures that it holds firm against the currents while giving your bait the stability it needs. title: MV-R XX PRO 16.0M STANDARD POLE FISHING PACKAGE
description: The MV-RXX is now a household name in the industry, synonymous with perfection in many ways, and something that anglers are proud to own. Award-winning and dubbed the ‘dawn of the Hyper-pole era’, this really is something we are truly proud of. But, we at Maver HQ are always striving to continually raise the bar, which is why the MV-RXX PRO was born! Still retaining all the same features as the RXX that everyone’s come to know and love, including the 18mm mandrel, the biggest change with our PRO version is the brand new carbon fibre integrated into the manufacturing process. The top-quality M9 carbon material is typically found in windsurfing division, meaning strength is increased whilst also being able to easily withstand and resist any further tension that may occur from strong winds or those feisty larger fish. Don’t panic – the lightweight properties are all still there, giving you extra without any compromise. Our Reglass partners have incorporated the very best of European technology, along with our patented features, to ensure this pole will be nothing short of flawless. The finishing touch of our exclusive ‘AFS’ anti-friction coating makes this a dream to hold in your hand. We know this pole is unique, so we’ve also paired it with a stunning pole package, providing everything you could need and more. Topkits, additional sections, and even one of our Pole Protection Cases to store it all in, making sure your new purchase is looked after. Speaking of, we’re also giving you our complimentary 1-year manufacturer’s warranty to give you the ultimate peace of mind when out on the bank. Are YOU going to turn PRO? MV-RXX PRO Standard Package: 1 x 16m Pole 1 x 16m Mini Section 5 x X-Series Power Carp topkits 5 x X-series Powerlite topkits 2 x One Piece Kit 1 x Cupping Kit 1 x Pole Protection Case currently on back order, will ship when back in stock, please send up a message if you are interested and we can give you a more accurate delivery date.

title: MV-R XS PRO 16.0M STANDARD POLE FISHING PACKAGE
description: You can't have one without the other! Our popular MV-RXS model was brought out as another option for those not wanting to stretch to the flagship but still wanting a fantastic pole. But with the upgraded carbon technology now found in the RXX PRO, we couldn’t leave this beauty behind too! The MV-RXS PRO is still made with high-grade M8 carbon fibre, but this specific type of M8 carbon fibre is also used in making windsurfing divisions, so resistance to tension from strong winds and hard fighting fish is greatly improved whilst still remaining lightweight. Built on the same slim 18mm mandrel, Reglass have made sure to still incorporate the very best of European tech, along with our patented resigns, and of course, our exclusive 'AFS' finish for silky smooth handling. We can't have a pole this good without also pairing it with a stunning pole package, providing any new owners with plenty of topkits, additional sections, and even a Pole Protection Case to house it all in. It's time to turn PRO! title: MV-RXX 9.0m MARGIN POLE FISHING ( FULL PACKAGE )
description: Created with high-grade carbon fibre on a slim 18mm mandrel by our partners at Reglass, it incorporates all our exclusive resins and patented finishes, bringing a complete mix of the best European technology straight into your hands. Measuring at 9m in length, this is a serious piece of kit that has been tested to guarantee the perfect balance of sheer force and durability whilst still retaining that lightweight feel, so using this mighty tool is nothing but a dream. The pole package included supplies each angler with plenty of topkits for every eventuality that can be easily matched with even the strongest rated Dual Core, X-Core, and Tri-Core. What’s better is that our X-Series topkits are interchangeable with this pole, making it a perfect complement for those owning our RXX and RXS models, as well as any other pole that utilizes 18mm bore topkits, or a stand-out inclusion in any angler’s armoury. title: MAVER REALITY EVO FEEDER FISHING RODS
description: A fantastic collection of Reality EVO feeder rods. Manufactured using Hi-modulus carbon blanks which maximises power when casting, yet retains the sensitivity when playing big fish all adds up to a range of rods that are simply outstanding. Developed to cover a variety of bomb/feeder techniques. All boast a stunning finish that will appeal to many anglers who demand maximum value from their new rods, featuring a bespoke flattened cork handle for added performance and comfort. Features: EVA twist grip Top quality EVA/flattened cork handle High quality lined guides Quality graphite screw reel fitting Folding hook keeper ring Choose from the options below, either purchase the rod on it’s own or add one of the bundle offers. Bundle offer one - Spool of line, pack of hooks, small bag of hook bait. £9.99 Bundle offer two - Feeder Cast & Catch box, this includes - 1x spool of line, 2x pack hook to nylon, 1x roller swivel pack, 1x disgorger, 4x assorted feeders, 1x bag of Fjuka Fat Boy hook bait, 1× 500g bag of Fjuka squeeze ready ground bait or pellets, 1x medium Saber tackle box. title: MAVER S2023 XSERIES MATCH FISHING SEAT BOX
description: Maver S2023 Fishing Seatbox: A Reel Game-Changer! Introducing the Maver S2023 Fishing Seatbox—a splendid masterpiece crafted in Italy, designed to make your angling experience as delightful as a daydream on the lake! This ingenious station combines practicality and comfort like peanut butter and jelly—only, you know, way less sticky and way more useful. Stability and Comfort—The Dynamic Duo The clever 4-leg system is here to save the day—no more wobbling on uneven ground! Each leg sports a telescopic adjustment, ensuring that your throne remains steadfast, even on the most treacherous of terrains. And say goodbye to sinking in the mud! The oversized mud feet offer an extra layer of solidity, so you can keep your focus on catching that monster fish rather than playing a game of "balance challenge." Long Hours? No Problem! With a seat tailored for folks who enjoy long fishing marathons, you won’t end up with a backache that echoes through the ages! Comfort is key, and the Maver S2023 doesn’t just throw you a lifebuoy; it hands you a fluffy pillow. Storage Galore! Let’s talk about storage because, let’s be honest, every angler knows the importance of having just the right gear at hand. This splendid seatbox comes packed with two deep front drawers and handy winder trays, making it easy to organize your tackle like a seasoned pro. Customize your set-up to fit any fishing discipline—because variety is the spice of life, right? Style Meets Functionality It’s not just about being practical; it also has to look fabulous! The Maver S2023 effortlessly merges sophisticated construction details with aesthetics, making it a true showstopper at your fishing spot. Trust us, this seatbox is the real deal—a dependable companion that’s guaranteed to stand the test of time, whether you’re reeling in the big ones or waiting for a nibble. So pack up your tackle, grab your rod, and experience the magic of the Maver S2023 Fishing Seatbox. Your fishing adventures will never be the same aga

title: Mikado Enclave Folding Fishing Chair
description: Introducing the ultimate fishing chair: the Enclave! This isn’t just any ordinary chair; it’s a snug haven for your angling adventures. Designed for those multi-day quests by the water, it boasts an insane level of comfort that will make you feel like you’re lounging on a cloud made of fish tales! Key Features: Adjustable Legs with Large Feet: Say goodbye to wobbly chairs! The sturdy legs ensure you’ve got a solid base, even on the most uneven ground. Perfect for those riverside spots where Mother Nature forgot to flatten the earth. Armrests: Slip on your best fishing hat, kick your feet up, and rest your arms in pure relaxation. These armrests provide the perfect support for those long hours of waiting for your next big catch! Foldable: Transporting this gem is a breeze! The foldable chair allows you to pack it away easily when you’re done battling the waves or off to your next secret fishing location. cushion with Polar Fleece Finish: You might end up waking up to the sound of splashing water instead of an alarm clock! The plush, polar fleece finish will keep you snug and warm, even when the sun dips below the horizon. Your back will thank you after hours of fishing in comfort. Proper Dimensions for All Sizes: We’ve got you covered, tall anglers! With dimensions that cater to everyone from the vertical giants to the pint-sized pros, this chair ensures everyone can kick back and enjoy the great outdoors in style. No more sitting on uncomfortable stumps or rickety picnic chairs! With the Enclave, you’ll be reeling in not just fish, but comfort and relaxation too. Get ready to settle into the fishing chair of your dreams—and who knows, you might just catch the biggest fish while you’re lounging in it! Ditch the discomfort and elevate your fishing experience with the Enclave family's Top-Class Sleep System. title: Outwell Appetizer 1-Burner Travel Compact Gas Stove
description: Introducing the Outwell Appetizer 1-Burner – your trusty companion for culinary adventures under the sun or during unexpected outdoor rendezvous! With a single steel burner stove, this nifty gadget is all about fast and efficient cooking. The wide pot stands ensure that no pot is left behind, while the precise control knobs give you the power to fine-tune your cooking with ease. Stability? Check! The sturdy non-slip feet at each corner mean you won’t have to worry about your stir-fry doing an unexpected dance. This stove is designed for convenience, using small handy gas cartridges and flexible hoses for that extra bit of versatility – perfect for beach picnics, outdoor escapades, or simply being that prepared friend during emergencies. And don’t fret about the setup; it comes complete with a hose and regulator. Weighing in at a mere 700 g, it’s light enough for all your adventures but tough enough to deliver big flavour. So grab your fishing rod, throw in the Outwell Appetizer 1-Burner, and get ready to whip up some delicious bites wherever the day takes you! Uses EN417 threaded self-sealing gas cartridges (NOT included) Compact portable gas stove Variable heat control Stable high heat output burner Stainless steel burner Low and stable stove Plastic feet for stability PVC hose W/auto shut off

title: SOTO Amicus Burner and New River Cooking Pot Combo
description: SOTO Amicus and New River Pot Combo is a combined set of the Amicus Stove and the New River Pot at a special price and offers a great bundle option. AMICUS STOVE Powerful, compact and wind resistant, the SOTO Amicus is a great stove for both entry level and the lightweight enthusiast alike. The Amicus has many of the capabilities usually found only in more expensive stoves, and is a great choice for camping and lightweight backpacking. The stove comes complete with its own stow-bag. The Amicus is compatible with all standard isobutane canisters (canister not included). NEW RIVER POT The SOTO New River Pot is a compact and durable lightweight pot, great for single person use. Featuring a texturised base for increased slip resistance. Made In Japan SOTO is part of a third generation family owned business (Shinfuji Burner Company), who have 40+ years of engineering experience behind them. Specialising in stove and burner technology SOTO are dedicated to the pursuit of manufacturing the best stoves in the world. AMICUS Concave burner for windshielding 4 x folding pot support Output: 3023W, 10315BTU, 2600kcal/h Weight: 75g NEW RIVER POT Volume: 1000ml Weight: 141g Material: Hard Anodised Auminium

title: Wildo Explorer Kit Multi Compact Dinner Set - Olive
description: Explorer Kit: Your Ultimate Camping Companion Meet the Explorer Kit: the small, lightweight, and practical solution for all your camping mealtime needs! This all-in-one set is designed to ensure you’re well-fed, even when dining in the great outdoors. What's Inside? Camper Plates : Enjoy your meals on a choice of the DEEP or FLAT Camper Plates. Kåsa & Kåsa XL : Sip in style with a Kåsa and a Kåsa XL, perfect for everything from sipping your morning brew to gulping down some piping hot soup. Fold-A-Cup® : Stay hydrated and eco-friendly! With the power of a fork, spoon, and knife all in one, the Spork is your dining superhero. title: Wildo Camp-A-Box Complete Compact Lunch Set - Olive
description: Wildo Camp-A-Box Complete – Olive: Your Adventure Companion Get ready to elevate your camping cuisine with the Wildo Camp-A-Box Complete in a fabulous olive hue! This nifty little mealtime set is designed for the adventurous spirit, combining practicality with charm – all thanks to inspired Swedish design. What's Inside? Dual-Purpose Deep Plate and Lid : This isn’t just a plate; it's a bowl too! The deep lid acts as an extra bowl, perfect for hearty campsite stews or your favourite pasta dish! Chopping Board with Strainer : Say goodbye to tedious clean-ups! With clever draining holes on one corner, you can chop and strain in one fell swoop. It’s like having your own mini kitchen in the wild! 3 Compartment Condiment Shaker : Spice up your outdoor feasts with a touch of whimsy. Keep your salt, pepper, and secret herbs dry and at the ready in this stylish shaker – no soggy seasonings here! Fold-a-Cups : Two sizes of these compact wonders mean you’ll always have the right cup for your brew! Whether it's a morning espresso or an evening’s tipple, you’ll be sipping in style. Spork : Why choose between a fork and a spoon when you can have both? The versatile spork tackles everything from soup to salad – it’s the true MVP of mealtime! Why You'll Love It Lightweight and compact, the Wildo Camp-A-Box Complete is designed to fit perfectly into your backpack without weighing you down. Whether you’re heading to the hills, the beach, or just the backyard, this set ensures you’re never without a delicious meal. Unleash your inner gourmet, create culinary delights, and make every camping trip a gastronomic adventure with the Camp-A-Box Complete in olive. Eat, drink, and be merry – the wild awaits! title: Easy Camp Adventure Cook Pots And Pan + Kettle Set L
description: The Easy Camp Adventure Cook Set L is your ultimate companion for mouth-watering meals under the open sky! Designed for up to four hungry campers, this versatile cookware set features a delightful selection of pots, a kettle, and a frypan, ensuring you're equipped to whip up anything from a sizzling breakfast fry-up to a hearty evening stew. Crafted from uncoated aluminium, this cook set delivers quick and efficient heat distribution, while keeping your culinary creations unburnt and delicious. Just a wee reminder: avoid cooking with acidic or salty foods, as they might ruin the set's lively charm. And if you’re storing leftovers, ensure they stay nice and cool below 5°C if they'll be around longer than a day. Get ready to stir, simmer, and serve up some campsite delights! 4-Person Set, contents include: Pot 2L Pot 3L Fry Pan 21.8cm Kettle 0.9L 1 x Gripper (Pot Handle)

title: SOTO Micro Torch Vertical Fire Lighter – Black
description: The SOTO Micro Torch Vertical is an ultra-compact pocket blow torch that fits nearly within the palm of your hand. Burning at an impressive 1300°C this windproof torch makes for a great bit of gear to include in your kit next time you go outdoors. The Micro Torch is refillable and has a large knob for easy adjustment of the flame size. Complete with a flip-cap to protect the burner head from dust and other debris, which also serves to prevent accidental ignition. The gas cartridges from which you can refill this item are not included, these are: –  Butane gas cartridge (they type used for lighters), – Threaded Gas cartridge ( the type used with camping stoves) – this cartridge requires the use of SOTO Fill Adaptor (OD-TRC) Burns at 1300°C Weights only 35g Fits in your palm Refillable Protective cap to protect burner head and prevent accidental ignition

title: MIKADO REEL - BIXLITE NG 2006 FD SPINNING REEL
description: Mikado Reel - Bixlite NG 2006 FD Reel Introducing the latest marvel in the world of angling – the Mikado Bixlite NG 2006 FD Reel! This spinning reel isn't just a pretty face; it's a harmonious marriage of both style and substance that every fisherman (or woman) would want in their tackle box. Key Features: Attractive Design : Say goodbye to boring reels! The Bixlite NG boasts aesthetics that will make you the envy of the fishing pond while you're casting away. Robust Handle : Equipped with a rigid, screw-in handle that screams 'stability', making sure that you won't lose your grip when the big one takes the bait. Smooth Operation : With 6 precise ball bearings including a thrust bearing, this reel ensures an ultra-smooth retrieve. Whether you’re pulling in a small trout or battling a hefty salmon, you’ll appreciate the seamless action. Reliable Drag System : The drag on this reel is as steady as a careful angler’s patience. Adjust it to suit your needs and make your catch the highlight of your fishing adventure! Specifications: Model : 2006 Weight : 205g (light as a feather but tough as nails!) Gear Ratio : 5.2:1, perfect for quick retrieves when the fish are biting! Line Capacity : 0.2mm/200m or 0.3mm/90m, accommodating your line needs for various fishing conditions. Available Sizes : This beauty comes in four sizes, ensuring there’s a Bixlite NG reel for every angler! Summary: The Bixlite family just got better with the introduction of the NG 2006 FD Reel. With its balance of precision, durability, and eye-catching design, it’s the perfect companion for your next fishing escapade. Don’t just catch fish; reel in compliments too!

title: Mikado Soft Spinning Lure LRF Fishing - FISHUNTER 5cm 5 pcs - 	Natural - PMFHL5-347
description: The work on this legendary lure began in 2006. The need to create a new quality in soft lures was born due to the obvious imperfections in the then-available lures, as well as the ideas and needs that emerged during long hours of predator fishing using the spinning method. The first prototypes were focused on creating an innovative shape of the lure by redesigning the arrangement of the body-tail-blade to get extremely aggressive work noticeable already at the time of fall. Thickened and overloaded body, in combination with the increased tail surface, brought completely new dynamics, giving as a result an extremely strong hydro acoustic wave more intensely provoking predators to attack. The other idea was to design a “nest” in the front part of the soft lure, adapting to the shape of the jig head by “sucking in” its part, which resulted in better aerodynamics and reduced the problems with removing the lure from the hook after unsuccessful predator attack. Then, the time came for such a selection of the composition and consistency of plastic, from which Fishunter was to be made, to obtain the ideal ratio between the elasticity and durability of the mixture. After many trials and tests, the first version of Fishunter was born, presented in our catalogue for the season 2007. This product has proven to be such an effective lure for predators that it became a bestseller on the spinning market from the very beginning, and until today, forms the basis of the fishing arsenal used by the spinning enthusiasts all over Europe. supplied in a pack of 5 because we all know your going to lose a few in a tree.
tags: lure, soft shad, 5cm, natural, predator, bait, LRF fishing, fishing, angling, pike, perch, zander, trout, chub, bass

This product has proven to be such an effective lure for predators that it became a bestseller on the spinning market from the very beginning, and until today, forms the basis of the fishing arsenal used by the spinning enthusiasts all over Europe. supplied in a pack of 5 because we all know your going to lose a few in a tree. /soft-lures lure, soft shad, natural, predator, bait, LRF fishing, fishing, angling, pike, perch, zander, trout, chub, bass Mikado lrf, predator lure

title: Crafty Catcher Prepared Particle Buckets 3kg - Natural Hemp
description: Crafty Catcher Particles – the crème de la crème of fishing bait! Sourced directly from the country of origin, these beauties ensure you’re getting only the richest, most delectable offerings the waters have to provide. Our unique preparation process guarantees that each particle is cooked to perfection, allowing it to leak a tantalising blend of natural sugars and oils right into your swim. This means your bait is not just sitting there; it’s putting out a buffet invitation that fish simply can’t resist! Designed with longevity in mind, Crafty Catcher Particles have a long shelf life so you can keep your tackle box stocked up without the worry of it going off. Plus, they’re completely P.V.A. friendly – no more choosing between quality and convenience! Whether you’re spodding out a feast, utilising bait boats for that pinpoint accuracy or laying down a carpet of deliciousness along the margins, these particles are your go-to solution for effective long-range feeding. Get ready to reel 'em in, because with Crafty Catcher Particles, you’re not just fishing; you’re crafting a fishy masterpiece!

title: Peg No.1 Method Ready Fishing Pellets 1.8kg - Scopex
description: Various Flavours Pellets Introducing Peg No.1 Method Ready Pellets – your secret weapon for a swift and effective day on the water! These high attract pellets are infused with soluble attractants, ensuring that the fish can’t resist their siren call. No need for time-consuming preparation; simply pop open the tub and squeeze these delightful little morsels directly onto your method feeder. The magic happens when they hit the water – the liquid attractants seep out, creating a feeding frenzy as they entice fish to your spot quicker than you can say "catch of the day!" Available in a medley of enticing flavours, these pellets are designed to take your angling game to the next level. Whether you're a novice or a seasoned pro, Peg No.1 Method Ready Pellets simplify your fishing experience, letting you focus on what really matters – reeling in those big ones! Get ready to cast your worries aside and let the pellets do the talking.

title: Mikado M-Shad 20cm Soft Predator Lure - Pike
description: M-shad is a new creation of the Mikado design team, made for the 2019 season and based on broad experience of the best Mikado Fishing Team spin fishing anglers. Application of the state-of-the-art 3D scanning and coating technique resulted in an unbelievably realistic representation of a real fish on the M-Shad lures. Perfect profile of the lure assures very realistic action - irresistible for predators. M-Shad acts just like a real fish, even when sinking freely, or being moved slowly; even then the body quivers delicately, letting the tail act at the same time. Smaller sizes are great for autumn perch and zander, whereas larger ones will deliver a pike.

title: MIKADO JIG HEAD  - ABERDEEN - 7g - 1BN - 3 PIECE SET
description: Professional jig-heads casted with a high quality lead and paired with strong and extremely sharp hooks, designed for a spinning 1.5"-5" lures. Innovative lure fixing system based on a three rings carefully placed on the shank, which guarantee the perfect hold of the bait while angling. High-quality forged and chemically sharpened hooks, together with a perfectly balanced ready product, result with a firm and solid strike every single time. Unique hook forging process makes them completely strain-resistant while maintaining the necessary flexibility so that they can face the hardest duels with the heaviest and most vicious predators. Nickel coating protects the hooks from stains and allows storage in the toolboxes for a long time.

title: MIKADO SPINNER SPOON - FOCUS NO 3 / 21g / 7.0cm - GOLD
description: Introducing our perfect, versatile spoons – the Swiss Army knives of the fishing world! Available in a delightful array of colours and shapes, these lures are designed to catch the eye of fish while adding a splash of excitement to your tackle box. Each spoon features robust connector rings and razor-sharp treble hooks, ensuring that when a fish decides to nibble, it doesn’t just play with your bait – it’s firmly hooked for the fight! The durable, electroplated coating not only gives these lures a striking appearance but also ensures that they stand the test of time, resisting rust and wear through all your fishing escapades. To top it all off, our unique scales texture adds an extra dimension to the lure, creating a realistic presentation that mimics the aquatic critters fish can't resist. Whether you’re casting from the shore or reeling in the big one from a boat, these spoons are the perfect recipe for a successful fishing trip. Get ready to make your next catch a legendary tale!

title: Mikado Fly MLX Fly fishing reel 3/4"
description: FLY MLX 3/4 High-Class Fly Reel Meet the marvel of performance and precision: the FLY MLX 3/4 Fly Reel ! Crafted with cutting-edge CNC technology , this reel is like a sweet serenade for the avid angler — a true piece of art that whispers, “Catch me if you can!” Key Features: Precision Drag System: Equip yourself with a drag that’s sharper than your favorite fishing pun. No more worries about that feisty trout or elusive grayling getting away. Thin lines? Bring 'em on! Versatile Size Options: Whether you’re chasing after trout, grayling, or cheeky chub, this reel has got your back. Available in two sizes, it’s the perfect partner for all your fishing escapades. Line Capacity: Handle your WF4F line with a touch of finesse — boasting a capacity of 50m (20lb). That's enough line to cast your worries away! Featherlight Weight: Weighing in at a svelte 155g , this reel lets you fish comfortably all day without feeling like you’ve been lifting weights at the gym. Fish with Style Let the FLY MLX be your trusty companion on the water — because every great fishing story deserves a reel that can keep up! So grab yours today and experience the high-class difference. Your fishing adventures will never be the same!

This rod is like having a superpower — its unparalleled sensitivity transforms you into a bait-detecting maestro. You’ll feel even the faintest nibble, giving you that sweet edge over those slippery fish! Key Features: Length : 305 cm (10 ft) - Perfect length to reach every cozy hiding spot in the lake or on the river. Transport Length : 80 cm - Because we know you’ve got places to go and fish to catch! Sections : 4 - Time to show off your skill in assembling this beauty; it's easier than pie! AFTM Class : 4 - Ideal for sneaky presentations that drive fish wild. Weight : Just 97 g - Light as a feather, yet strong enough to battle it out with the biggest catches. So grab your FLY MLX Nymph and get ready to reel in the fun! Whether you're a seasoned angler or just dipping your toes into the fishing waters, this rod is ready to make every trip an adventure. Let's hook some memories!

title: Mikado Sensual N.G Ultra Light Spin LRF Fishing Rod 208cm 2-10g casting weight
description: Sensual NG Light Spin: The Perfect Dance Partner for Fisherfolk Meet the Sensual NG Light Spin , your new rod that’ll have you zipping through the water with grace and precision. Specially crafted for light and ultralight spinning, this beauty is like a delicate ballet dancer who can surprisingly step into the boxing ring! Constructed with our meticulously selected graphite structure, this rod doesn’t just have a sensitive touch; it’s tough enough to handle a surprise guest like a feisty pike or a sneaky zander. If fish could do the tango, this would be their go-to partner! Sales Unit : 1 cheeky companion Max. C.W. : 10 g of sheer joy Min. C.W. : 2 g for those gentle nibbles Length : 208 cm of graceful extension Transport Length : 109 cm, so you can take it anywhere without playing a game of limbo Sections : 2, because who doesn’t love a good duet? Family : SENSUAL, naturally! Tip : Tube, to keep the vibe flowing Weight : Just 96 g, so light it practically floats! With the Sensual NG Light Spin, you'll be flipping and reeling with artful finesse. It's not just a fishing rod; it's the salty breath of adventure wrapped in an elegant package, ready to hook your next big catch! Get ready to create some fishy tales that dance right off the scales! Choose from the options below, either purchase the rod on it’s own or add one of the bundle offers. Bundle offer one - 1x Pack of jig heads 1x Spool of Mikado Mono lure line 1x Pack of soft lures Add £9.99 Bundle offer two - Lure Cast & Catch box, this includes - 1x spool of Mikado line, 2x pack of small soft lures, (38mm or 52mm) 2x small spinners 1x pack of Mikado wire trace 1x pack of barrel swivels 1x pack of Mikado Snaps 2x packs of jig heads 2x packs of SPRO CHEB weights 1x SPRO Multitool 1x Mikado double sided lure box Our price - £66 - if bought with a rod Add £52.99 perfect gift option for Christmas, birthdays or just because. .

title: 1kg Bag of  Coppens Fishing Pellets PVA Friendly Feed Bait 2mm or 4.5mm
description: Coppens Premium Carp Coarse Pellets 2mm or 4.5mm The Ultimate Feeder Fishing Treat: Packed with Fishy Goodness! Dive into our latest bait sensation that’s designed to reel in the biggest catches! With a balanced amino acid and fatty acid profile , this bait is here to provide your favorite finned friends with a buffet they can't resist. Why You'll Love It: Highly Water Stable : This bait won't turn into mush! Its formulated stability ensures it holds up well underwater, giving your catch all the time in the world to notice it. Packed with Attractants : We've loaded this bait with irresistible attractants that make it an absolute magnet for all the slippery swimmers out there. Your fishing spot is about to get a whole lot livelier! Includes Krill : You'll find that oceanic flavor of krill infused in every morsel—it's like a seafood party for your pals below the surface! Product Specs: Size : 2mm or 4.5mm Protein : 30% Fat : 9% Crude Fibre : 2.1% Ash : 9.5% Waterstable 3hrs Attractive Sinking Feeder Lap Free How to Use: This bait is a breeze! Just give it a quick soak before using it. Then, squeeze it around your feeder or lead—watch as the fish flock in like it’s their last banquet. Get ready to enhance your feeder fishing game with this quirky, yet highly effective bait! Cast your worries aside, it's time to catch 'em all!
tags: Coppens, Premium, pellets, feeder, coarse, fishing, carp, bream, tench, chub, match, angling, bait

title: Mikado 1 Person travel Dinner Set / Fishing, Camping, Hiking
description: The Solo Dining Set: Your Essential Angling Companion Introducing our Basic Dinner Set —the ultimate dining solution designed for the lone ranger who loves to fish and feast! This compact set includes a stylish plate, your trusty cutlery (knife, fork, spoon, and teaspoon), all neatly tucked inside a good-looking case worthy of a second glance. Whether you’re embarking on a solo angling adventure, enjoying a weekend camping trip, or simply craving some impromptu fish and chips in the great outdoors, this set is your perfect companion. Its lightweight design allows you to pack it easily into your rucksack or keep it in your car, ready for any spontaneous culinary occasion. Why settle for takeaway containers when you can elevate your dining experience with our chic, practical dinner set? Plus, we offer FREE UK DELIVERY straight to your door—because who wants to fork out extra for shipping when you’re already rewarded with delicious fishy goodness? Set yourself up for a delightful solo meal—grab your Basic Dinner Set today, and let your taste buds be your guide!

title: SOTO Micro Torch Horizontal Fire Lighter – Orange
description: The SOTO Micro Torch Horizontal is an ultra-compact pocket blow torch that fits nearly within the palm of your hand. Burning at an impressive 1300°C this windproof torch makes for a great bit of gear to include in your kit next time you go outdoors. The Micro Torch is refillable and has a large knob for easy adjustment of the flame size. Complete with a flip-cap to protect the burner head from dust and other debris, which also serves to prevent accidental ignition. The gas cartridges from which you can refill this item are not included, these are: –  Butane gas cartridge (they type used for lighters), – Threaded Gas cartridge ( the type used with camping stoves) – this cartridge requires the use of SOTO Fill Adaptor (OD-TRC) Burns at 1300°C Weights only 35g Fits in your palm Refillable Protective cap to protect burner head and prevent accidental ignition

title: Maver Reality 2.0m Telescopic Compact Landing Net Handle
description: Introducing our latest innovation: the composite 2m tele landing net handle! Perfectly crafted for those who want to reel in the savings while still getting top-notch quality. This beauty stands tall at 2 meters but cleverly collapses to a mere 60cm, making it the ultimate companion for anglers on the go. Don't let the slim design fool you - this handle is tougher than a triple-knotted fishing line! Whether you're casting at bustling commercial ponds or quietly sneaking up on nature's hidden gems, this handle is ready to tackle any challenge.

title: Mikado Tsubame Feeder Fishing Line - Black - 0.16mm 4.4kg - 150m
description: Tsubame is a range of specialist, new generation, “programmed” polyamide fishing lines, designed specifically for coarse and spin fishing techniques. We maintain full control over the polymerization process which results in the production of a material with the specifically expected features. The base material is refined polyamide straight-chain polymer. The uniform and even distribution of the elasticity factor along the entire length of the line provides hauling strong and large fish safe even with the use of very small diameters. The key characteristics of Tsubame lines: - amazing dynamic line durability and dynamic durability with a wet knot - strengthened resistance to abrasion with very low surface friction factor - UV resistant - no memory - low visibility in the water - perfectly uniform diameter

title: Crafty Catcher Big Hit Boilies 15mm 2kg
description: Crafty Catcher 2kg 15mm Boilies - Big Hit Range Get ready to reel in the big ones with our new Crafty Catcher boilies from the Big Hit range! These little spheres of genius are not just a feast for the eyes but a banquet for the fish, crafted with a delightful fusion of flavours that’s a feast for the senses. Key Features: Protein Powerhouse : Bursting with high protein levels, these boilies provide the nutrition that carp crave, ensuring they stick around to nibble! Intense Sweetness : Enhanced with an intense sweet attractor that draws fish in like moths to a flame. Get ready for the bites! Versatile Usage : Use them whole for a strong initial attraction or crush them to create a cloud of enticing aroma and flavour. Either way, carp won’t stand a chance! Bait Booster : Want to up your game? Blend these beauties with your favourite boilie dip for that extra oomph and coax those fish right into your net! If you're planning a longer session or want to bait up heavily, the 2kg bag of Crafty Catcher Big Hit Boilies is the smart choice. Great value for money without compromising on quality or attraction. At Voyagers Hook we love the fact that these boilies work straight out of the bag — no messing, no prep, just fish.

title: Mikado Bixlite Pike Master Lure Fishing Rod 240cm 30-105g CW 2 Section
description: Mikado Bixlite Casting Rod Meet your new best mate for luring in the big ones! This 240 cm powerhouse is crafted specifically for angling with large lures, making it the perfect wingman for pike, Zander, or sea fishing escapades. Length: 240 cm Transport Length: 125 cm Sections: 2 Family: Bixlite Tip: Tube Weight: 234 g With a long handle and a comfy reel seat, it’s built for all-day comfort—because nobody likes a sore grip after hours spent chasing the big catch. The resilient blank ensures your casts slice through the air effortlessly, sending your lures screaming far into the deep blue. Thanks to its progressive action, landing that whopper becomes pure joy, not a struggle. So, grab your favourite lure, channel your inner fishing wizard, and let the Pike Master turn your next fishing trip into a legendary tale!

title: Rapture Swing Shad 4cm Soft Lure Neon Yellow 14 Pack
description: The Swing Shad has thick body, deadly on jigs, spinnerbaits, Texas-rigs, and Carolina Rigs. No matter how it’s fished, the reinforced paddle tail of the Swing Shad creates a peculiar swinging action that fish find irresistible. The Swing Shad is also made with a special dual-injection moulding process, which combines two different salted plastics and gives it a well balanced action at any speed. Impregnated with fish scent as well, the Swing Shad is sure to become a familiar site in stowaways everywhere. 4cm long 14 pack

title: Coppens Pre-Drilled Pellets 14mm Black Halibut Carp Barbel Fishing bait 500g
description: Pre-Drilled Black Halibut Pellets are an easy to hair rig hook bait suitable for all medium to large fish. These Pre-Drilled Halibut Pellets are high in protein & oils making them a great attractor pellet for all medium to large fish such as Tench, Barbel, Catfish, Bream & Carp.  Pre-Drilled Halibut Pellets are simple to use, simply thread your baiting needle through the centre hole & pull the hair rig through & apply a boilie stop (or Piece of twig) Analytical Constituents Crude Protein 40% Crude Oils 25% Crude Fibre 2% Crude Ash 11%

title: OAKWOOD Camo fishing safe folding unhooking Landing mat 100 x 50cm
description: OAKWOOD Camo Landing Unhooking Mat Meet your new best mate for every carp catch – the OAKWOOD Camo Landing Unhooking Mat . Sized perfectly at 100cm x 50cm, this high-protection unhooking mat gives your scaly friends the comfy landing they deserve. Crafted from 100% nylon and finished with a water-resistant coating, it keeps both your mat and your catch dry even on the dampest Somerset mornings. When you’re done admiring your prize and releasing it back to the depths, simply roll it up for effortless transportation. Camouflage design means it blends right into the bankside, keeping your fishing flow as smooth and sneaky as your tackle. Give your catch top-notch care with the OAKWOOD – because every fish deserves a VIP reception.

title: Mikado Black Crystal 1005 FD LRF Spin Fishing Compact Reel
description: You know the saying: a chain is only as strong as its weakest link? With the Black Crystal range, we’ve made sure there is no weak link. No nasty surprises on your fishing trips. Built with a tough duraluminium body, rotor, and transmission, this reel is incredibly strong. CNC machined parts with Japanese ceramic ball bearings guarantee smooth and silent performance. The multi-disc drag system gives you precise control over line tension. The lightweight aluminum spool has holes to cut weight and a special hole at the bottom to stop the line from twisting. Available in four sizes, Black Crystal reels fit any spin fishing style. Strong, stylish, and reliable — that’s the Black Crystal. title: Mikado Fishunter 3.5cm Micro Soft Fishing Lure - purple / blue glitter  - 8 pack
description: Work began in 2006 to fix soft lure flaws and enhance predator fishing with spinning. Early designs altered body, tail, and blade for aggressive movement, even on the fall. Thicker body and larger tail boosted water vibrations to attract predators. The lure’s front fit snugly on jig heads for better flight and easy removal after missed strikes. After many tests, the perfect plastic balanced stretchiness and strength. Released in 2007, Fishunter quickly became a Europe-wide top seller and remains popular. title: SPRO Xtender V2 1.8m 0.5-4g Ultra Light Micro Lure Fishing Rod
description: The Xtender is the most compact 2-section spinning rod on the market with a telescopic construction in the handle. Each Xtender 2.0 rod comes with a compact and luxurious neoprene cover. The Xtender 2.0 has a completely redesigned 40 Ton carbon top section, making these rods extremely fast and responsive. In addition to protection, the silicone bump butt provides a built-in clamping function for the telescopic section and space for the top section. It also acts as a counterweight making the rods extra comfortable to handle. Our aim was to create the most compact rod range possible without sacrificing the performance & action of the rod. The Xtender ‘semi-telescopic‘ rod series has a telescopic handle section and still provides an excellent action as you would expect from a Freestyle rod. title: SPRO Freestyle Breeze UL 1.8m 1-4g Ultra Light Lure Spinner Fishing Rod
description: Spro Freestyle Breeze UL Spinning Rod – 2719 180 For the angler who thrives on precision and finesse, the Spro Freestyle Breeze UL Spinning Rod is an absolute gem. Crafted from feather-light 30T carbon, this rod boasts a slim, ultra-light blank that’s all about finesse. Perfectly balanced for casting and controlling lures weighing between 1 and 4 grams, it’s the ultimate companion when chasing shy, finicky fish. With a solid tip designed to detect even the most tentative nibbles, every bite comes through crystal clear. And because every gram counts, the handle section is pared down to the absolute minimum, keeping the rod whisper-light at just 80 grams. Wrapped up with premium Fuji K Frame guides, the Breeze UL measures a versatile 1.80 metres and breaks down neatly to a compact 0.95 metres for easy transport. Specs at a glance: Length: 1.80m Casting weight: 1–4g Weight: 80g Transport length: 0.95m Number of guides: 8 If ultra-light tackle is your playground, the Breeze UL is your trusty sidekick – light, agile, and ready to feel every subtle tug. title: Gamakatsu LS-3423F Large Eye Barbed Hook - Lure Hook Replacement - all sizes
description: Gamakatsu LS-3423F Large Eye Barbed Hook Looking to give your lures a cheeky upgrade? Our Gamakatsu LS-3423F Large Eye Barbed Hooks are your go-to! Perfect as a replacement for treble hooks or as the trusty bottom hook on your favourite lures, the large eye design makes rigging a breeze and amps up your catch potential. Why go single? Well, single hooks are the unsung heroes of the fishing world - they're kinder to the fish, less likely to turn your lure into a snag magnet, offer stellar fish control, and deliver a more reliable hook-up every time. Basically, they're the smarter, sassier sidekick your tackle box’s been begging for. Choose from multiple sizes in the drop-down and tailor your tackle to your exact needs. Because one hook can make all the difference here at Voyagers Hook!

title: Voyagers Hook Premium Himalayan Dark Pink Rock Salt - Fine Grade - Fishing Bait Additive - 1kg
description: Voyagers Hook Himalayan Dark Pink Salt 0.3–0.7mm – Food-Safe & Fishing-Ready Fine-grade crystals imported straight from the pristine salt mines of Pakistan – pure, unrefined goodness. Certified food-grade , so it’s safe for your supper as well as your spod mix. Also available in a coarse grade if you like a bit more crunch. Dual-purpose delight: Sprinkle it on your favourite dishes or jazz up your ground bait – one mineral-rich crystal, endless possibilities. Perfect for foodies, anglers, and anyone who likes a little extra flavour in life. ISO 22000 certified: Quality and safety locked down tighter than a tackle box lid. Legendary for fishing: Ideal for ground baits, solid bags, spod mixes, and any crafty concoctions to lure that next big catch. Versatile in the kitchen: Bake, season, cook, or just sprinkle on your chips – life’s too short for bland snacks. Rich in minerals: Over 84 trace minerals to support good health. Natural and unrefined: Free from additives and preservatives. Fine grain: Perfect for shakers and everyday use. Delicious flavour: Elevates the taste of any dish. Forget the Carp tax – you’re getting top-notch salt fit for humans and fish without the branded premiums – more bang for your buck, and more fish on your hook. Also available in other sizes to suit your needs.

This gem boasts a chunky body and a tail so long it’s practically waving hello, complete with a quirky little opening that sends out extra ripples to tease even the wariest nibblers. title: Mikado Automatic Folding Rubberised Landing Net 130cm 45/50cm
description: Mikado Automatic Instant Reach Landing Net Meet your new fishing sidekick: the Instant Reach Landing Net. Crafted with a rubber-coated mesh, it’s gentler than a lullaby on your finned friends — perfect for fish care and catch-and-release. No more worrying about tangles or scale damage! At just 70 cm folded, this lightweight marvel expands on demand. One flick, one click, and bam —an extra 30 cm reach, thanks to its automatic pole extension. That’s 30 cm more room to net those crafty critters lurking just out of hands’ reach. Worried about losing it on your adventures? Fear not! Partnered with a Mikado magnetic clip your net will always be to hand when you need it, so you can roam free and fish hard. Compact, clever, and oh so fish-friendly.

description: PRE ORDER NOW - In Stock Next Week Product of the Slovak manufacturer ECO D&M specializing in the production of certified, ecological, concrete weights for sport and recreational fishing. The most successful type for long throwing. The chosen shape pierces the air very well and flies as far as possible with minimal resistance. At the same time, it minimizes the effect of side wind when throwing, holds the direction well and is even more stable in flight. Optimum weight distribution reduces load sinking into mud and soft bottom. The absorbency of the material makes it possible to boost or dip the load itself and thus deliver more attractive aroma to the feeding place. Available weights (grams): 70g (2.5oz), 90g (3.17oz), 110g (3.88oz), 130g (4.5oz) Porosity and a rougher surface in turn allow excellent adhesion when covering the load with wrapping paste, its reliable retention on the load even during forceful contact. Both methods significantly increase the attractiveness of your fishing spot. Due to the iron content, the loads are magnetic, they can be easily pulled out of the water bed with a magnet and reused, which makes them even more valuable and highly sustainable towards the natural environment. Equipped with a universal swivel for fastening with all commonly available hanging clips, with the inline type fitted with a 5/3mm silicone insert for inserting a roller swivel of size UK8 and thus increasing the chance of self-jamming. All ECO Sinkers loads are certified and made of a special 7-component reinforced concrete mixture, which is non-toxic, eco-friendly and meets modern environmental regulations. When in contact with water, they are not harmful to humans, animals, other animals and organisms. title: Eco Sinkers Biodegradable Lead Free Fishing Weights - Swivel Pear Dropp - All Sizes
description: PRE ORDER NOW - In Stock Next Week The company ECO D&M s.r.o., specializing in the production of certified, ecological, iron-concrete weights for sport and recreational fishing, presents a new product from the Eco Line line, the Eco Sinkers Safety DROPP type. Already from the name Safety DROPP, we can use this type for the Dropp-off system, for which the notch on the back of this type of concrete is used. The Dropp-off system is used, for example, when fishing in obstacles or overgrown waters, for safe capture of the catch. Available weights (grams): 50g, 70g, 90g, 110g, 130g, 150g, 180g The most versatile type for rivers, sea or lakes Weight deviation – dry state of the product +-5g DROPP has an excellently positioned center of gravity and therefore this type can very effectively transfer the entire weight of the concrete to the tip of the hook during engagement and thus ensure its deeper and more effective penetration The absorbency of the material makes it possible to boost or dip the load itself and thus deliver more attractive aroma to the feeding place. Porosity and a rougher surface, in turn, enable excellent adhesion when wrapping the load with wrapping paste, its reliable retention on the load even during power throwing. Both methods significantly increase the attractiveness of your fishing spot. The flat and oval shape allows for better weight distribution, reducing the load sinking into mud and soft bottom. At the same time, the optimal distribution of weight and the correct location of the center of gravity enable a uniform descent in the water column without unwanted rotation and entanglement of the rig, even when descending at great depths. All ECO Sinkers loads are certified and made of a special 7-component reinforced concrete mixture, which is non-toxic, eco-friendly and meets modern environmental regulations. When in contact with water, they are not harmful to humans, animals, other animals and organisms.

description: PRE ORDER NOW - In Stock Next Week This specie is most commonly used for long range carp fishing. Its essential function, within its volume, allows it to get into mud and soft water bottom much less compared to classic lead. This is due to the inside construction and adjustment of the weight distribution that has been developed over the years. Another advantage of the Grippa is that each product contains 100% liquid absorption by using with a dip, booster or other liquid to make the fishing spot more attractive and to keep the aroma in the place. title: Eco Sinkers Biodegradable Lead Free Fishing Weights - Inline Feeder Basket - All Sizes
description: PRE ORDER NOW - In Stock Next Week We dare to say that after a series of long-term tests, we came up with an improvement that will fundamentally change fishing with the method feeder technique. Offer the fish something that hasn’t been on the market yet and works reliably! Last year’s tests showed up to 25% more strikes than with normal loads. Even the smallest detail of your installation can have a big impact on its success. The load has a solid tube guided through its center, which has an inner diameter of 2 mm, and therefore you can easily thread a cord or fishing line through it, even of the largest diameters. Available weights (grams): 40g, 60g The continuous iron-concrete feeder METHOD FEEDER FANS is based on a proven shape for method feeder fishing. The optimal distribution of weight and the correct location of the center of gravity enable a uniform descent in the water column without unwanted rotation and entanglement of the rig, even when descending at great depths. The absorbency of the material makes it possible to boost or dip the feeder itself and thus deliver more attractive aroma to the feeding place. Porosity and a rougher surface, in turn, enable excellent adhesion when filling the feeder with method mix or pellets, their reliable retention on the feeder even during power throwing. In the center of the feeder there is a hole for placing your bait so that it does not get stuck anywhere and is released from the feeder together with the bait without any obstacles. All ECO FEEDER BASKET feeders are certified and made of a special 7-component reinforced concrete mixture, which is non-toxic, eco-friendly and meets modern environmental regulations. When in contact with water, they are not harmful to humans, animals, other animals and organisms. Absorbency ECO FEEDER BASKET are designed so that after soaking in water, dip, booster or other liquid, they do not exceed their weight according to the marking on the load. Volumetric properties Reinforced concrete
tags: biodegrade, eco, eco sinkers, fishing, weight, casting, enviroment

title: Peg No1 Mayhem Premium Fishing Ground bait 1kg - All flavours
description: Unlock unrivalled attraction and angling performance with  Peg No.1 Mayhem Groundbait —a potent, finely textured blend engineered to create a seductive feeding zone and provoke aggressive bites. Key Features: Super-fine texture for precision delivery This light-coloured groundbait boasts an ultra-fine base of coarse and expander pellets, ensuring rapid dispersion and the formation of a vibrant, attractive cloud in commercial fisheries and still waters. Perfect balance of attraction and moderation Designed to entice without overfeeding, it maintains fish interest effectively—attracting species like carp, F1s, and bream while sustaining their feeding activity. Versatile mixing options Whether used solo or mixed 50/50 with method pellets, it delivers consistent and appealing bait presentation—especially effective when paired with Peg No.1 Carp pellets to cover a broad range of commercial angling tactics. Match-winning quality at an affordable price Peg No.1 products consistently receive high praise for their reliability and performance. As Mark Sawyer, Angling Times Tackle Editor notes, "Peg No.1 continues to attract admirers with its brilliantly consistent ranges of premium grade groundbaits, pellets and liquids." 1kg bag multiple flavours to choose from.
tags: ground bait, groundbait, bait, fishing, method feeder, method fishing, carp, barbel, bream, match, lake, river, peg no1, peg one

title: Crafty Catcher Big Hit Bag And Bait Booster Liquid 100ml - All Flavours
description: These sticky and highly concentrated bait boosters are the ultimate secret weapon for supercharging all your hook baits. Thanks to the nifty nozzle applicator, you can effortlessly squeeze the booster straight into PVA bags or onto sticks and method feeders before casting. This clever design ensures a slow-leaking, potent attractor trail that keeps the fish intrigued and biting longer. Perfect for adding that extra zing your tackle needs to stand out on the bank! Available in the following flavours: Spicy Krill And Garlic Plumberry And Black Pepper Squid And Octopus Strawberry Cream Crab And Krill Spicy Tuna Skopex And Squid Mulberry Cream Seed Tigernut Chocolate And Tangerine The Crafty Catcher Bag and Bait Booster is a versatile liquid attractant that works equally well soaked into a PVA bag mix or applied directly to your hookbait. At Voyagers Hook we love a product that earns its place in your tackle bag and this one definitely does. Simple, effective and great value.

title: Fjuka Fatboys 2 in 1 Hookable Pellet Fishing Bait - All Colours
description: Super-attractive hookable 10mm pellets for bigger fish Over 250, 10mm pellets in each 195g bag Loaded with Sensate™ Fish Accelerant for instant action Hook directly with total hook-hold – no need for drills or bands Fjuka’s Unique Flexible Formula The Perfect Instant-Action : all Fjuka bait is powered by a special combination of attractants known as Sensate ™. The micro attractants in Sensate™ disperse further, carry faster and give off 3000 X the flavour and taste of ordinary oil-based attractants. Catches on Lakes, Rivers and Canals: incredibly flexible and simple to use – beginners just hook and go with no soaking or other prep needed, while experienced anglers find it an irreplaceable part of their armory. Excellent Catch Rates: tested by thousands of anglers and proven a match-winning bait. Fjuka 2in1 is irresistible to river fish, silvers and specimens including carp, bream, grayling, barbel, rudd, tench, trout, F1s and crucians.  Super Long-Lasting: there are over 250 10mm pellets in each bag and once opened Fjuka will stay soft for up to 12 months. (Keep pellets in a sealed bag or container - will dry hard if packaging isn't re-sealed).  Only Human Food Grade Ingredients: Fjuka 2in1 is made from only high-quality ingredients. There are no plastics, gums, waxes or resins. It's just healthy, nutritious food that fish love (wheat and corn flour, starch and proteins with sugars and a little salt). At Voyagers Hook we love the Fjuka Fatboys because they genuinely do what they say on the tin. If you want a no fuss hookbait that works straight out of the bag on rivers, lakes and canals, these are hard to beat. One of our favourite recommendations for beginners and match anglers alike — simply hook and go.
tags: fatboys, fishing bait, pellets, carp, barbel, bream, match fishing, fishing tackle, fjuka

title: Fjuka 6mm Pop-Up Refill Pack Hookable Fishing Bait
description: The HOOKABLE Pop-up:  hook-direct, hair-rig, or band. BREAK to make SMALLER Pop-ups  that hook directly. SINGLE OUT THE BIG FISH:  small-fish-resistant texture PLUS sustained release of Sensate™ Fish Accelerant. VERY BUOYANT  when hooked. Use alone or combine with other baits to make deadly popped-up, or semi-buoyant rigs. BOOSTED SENSATE™ FISH ACCELERANT:  David Preston’s quick release attractant, Sensate™ proven to draw big carp, as well as F1s. CHOOSE to BLEND IN or STAND OUT:  4 fluoro colours - pink, orange, white, yellow - PLUS neutral-natural. Always have the right colour to single out the biggest fish. BOUYANT BAITS:  grab the attention of cruising fish with zero resistance to your bait being sucked in. PERFECT ON METHOD, BOMB or POLE:  hookable  yet resilient; fish with confidence knowing Fjuka Hookable Pop-ups are there when the big fish arrive. SUSTAINED RELEASE of SENSATE™ ATTRACTANTS:  tougher texture withstands small fish and creates a continuous leakage of Sensate™. As the Sensate™ content of water rises, it attracts F1s, crucians & big carp. As well as bream, tench & barbel. FAST-HOOK MAXIMISES FISHING TIME:  unique texture makes hooking and hair-rigging simple & quick. ALWAYS FISHING-READY:  long shelf life means Hookable Pop-ups are ready for whenever you want to fish.  Join the Fjuka Revolution today and try this revolutionary new bait for yourself.

title: SPRO Freestyle FS Lite 80 Unhooking Mat - 80CM
description: Fish care plays an important role in The Freestyle product range. The Lite Mat has a special filling which makes it possible to fold into an extremely compact 12cm roll. Laying your catch on the mat prevents any damage to the fish while allowing you to measure your catch responsibly. The mat also features an accurate ruler (up to 80cm) to quickly measure your catch while unhooking safely. The Lite Mat rolls into a pack size of around 12cm in diameter which is great for hanging on to the Backpack 25 with the i ncluded 360° swivel carabiner. See the step by step guide below on how to fold your Mat or check out the video at the bottom of the page more information.

title: SPRO Freestyle 13 in 1 Folding Fishing Multi Tool & Pouch

title: SPRO Freestyle FS Backpack 22 MK2 Fishing Bag
description: Vast improvements have been made to the Original Backpack 22. Clear water-resistant pockets, a stiffer form factor, and a water-resistant coated material have been included to improve the performance of the bag. Two Freestyle tackle boxes have also been included which are stored in our unique internal tackle wall located in the main compartment of the backpack. The straps on the left side of the bag can accommodate one set up rod, such as the  Xtender Rod. Strong D rings are also located on the backpack and offer a simple solution to hang Freestyle accessories such as the  Lite Mat . The backpack 22 has been outfitted with a new water-resistant fabric great for this rainier days. As with all Freestyle Luggage, you can expect a high quality and robust product based on our iconic Black and Grey styling. for more info click here to head to the SPRO website. Rod and accessories not included.

title: SPRO Freestyle Shoulder Bag V2 Fishing Bag
description: The Shoulder Bag has been a favorite among lure anglers due to its comfort and compact size. We have listened to our customers and finely tuned the new 2.0 version making the shoulder bag even better. The D-rings are strategically placed to make carrying the Lite Mat easier. The rigged lure board cover has improved form and we have included more water-resistant material on the outside. The Shoulder Bag V2 has been outfitted with a new water-resistant fabric great for this rainier days. As with all Freestyle Luggage, you can expect a high quality and robust product based on our iconic Black and Grey styling. The Shoulder Bag V2 features 2 compartments specifically designed with the angler in mind. The main compartment features 2 Freestyle Tackle Boxes, 1 x transparent zip pocket and an EVA rig board with a plastic Velcro cover. The smaller compartment features 2 transparent pockets, perfect for storing terminal tackle. for more info click here to head to the SPRO website. Accessories not included.

title: SPRO Bottom Jig Cheb Sinker Weights - All Sizes
description: The Spro Bottom Jigs are specially made for the so-called 'Cheburashka technique'. This particularly fine, originally Russian technique makes it possible to fish out the bottom with very light material. The special position of the Bottom Jig gives the lures a lot of freedom of movement and also makes it very easy to quickly change the lures. Highly recommended for fishing for perch, pike and zander. Very simple to use, just pop the clip out from the weight, attach it to your chosen hook, we recommend a big eye worm hook as it gives more freedom for the lure to move independently, then just clip it back into the weight. comes in multiple sizes with plenty in the pack to keep you going.

title: SPRO Freestyle Twist - On bottom jig Weights - Short -  All Sizes - 2 pack
description: With the Freestyle Twist-On Weights you can set up your rigs in no time thanks to the simple clips. Available in two versions. title: Maver Reality Evo Float Fishing Rod and Reel Kit
description: Get ready to hook your first big one with the ultimate starter pack for every new angler! Whether you're chasing river trout or pond perch, this kit's got you covered from tackle box to tip. Kit Includes: 1 x Reality EVO 10FT Float Rod — Long, light, and ready to dance with your catch. 1 x Reality 3000 Reel (loaded with line) — Smooth reeling action right out of the box. 1 x Cloth Rod Bag — Keep your stick snug and safe on every trek. 1 x Maver Rod Sleeve — Extra protection with a splash of style. This kit is your passport to fishing freedom — cast off, have a laugh, and reel ‘em in anywhere, any day! Reality 3000 Reel Instant anti-reverse bearing Lightweight design Computer balanced rotor Anti-twist line roller Intelligent Oscillating System (IOS) Ambidextrous Multi-disc drag (waterproof) Excellent line lay Supplied pre-loaded with line: Reality 3000 (0.20mm / 2.1kg) Reality Evo 10ft Float Rod A fantastic collection of Reality EVO float rods. Developed to cover a variety of float techniques. All boast a stunning finish that will appeal to many anglers who demand maximum value from their new rods, featuring a bespoke flattened cork handle for added performance and comfort. title: MAVER MV-R S1000 POLE PACKAGE 14.5m
description: With recent developments in carbon fibre technology, we at Maver pride ourselves on bringing you the very best, especially when it comes to poles. With our upgrades to the RXX and RXS models, we decided it’s time to produce a complete range that offers incredible quality that caters to multiple budgets. The S1000 model is constructed with a new M7 carbon type, one that is used in Reglass’ windsurfing division, to increase resistance to tension commonly found in the angling world when battling strong winds or tackling larger fish. We’re certainly not cutting corners when it comes to developing this awesome pole, with Reglass incorporating our typical exclusive manufacturing features found on all our poles, such as European technology and patented refinements, including the loved ‘AFS’ finish to provide that silky smooth feel to our sections. Bringing excellence without paying over the odds, the S1000 uses our familiar 22mm mandrel, making interchanging within the range straightforward. For anyone wanting to upgrade from a previous model that shares the same bore size, including the Signature Pro, Oculus, and Definition predecessors, interchangeability has been made effortless. The pole package supplied with this pole provides any new owner with enough Powerlite topkits to cover plenty of options, along with a cupping kit, and a mini extension to add onto the 14.5m section. All items will come within a MV-R Tube Holdall to provide protection and making transporting your carbon simple. To provide peace of mind when in use, each pole comes with a customary 12-month warranty, covering any manufacturing faults that may occur. MV-R S1000 Standard Package: 1 x 14.5m Pole 1 x 14.5m Mini Extension 3 x R-Series Commercial Power topkits 1 x Cupping Kit ( R-Series ) 1 x MV-R Tube Holdall

title: MAVER MV-R S2000 POLE PACKAGE 16m
description: With recent developments in carbon fibre technology, we at Maver pride ourselves on bringing you the very best, especially when it comes to poles. With our upgrades to the RXX and RXS models, we decided it’s time to produce a complete range that offers incredible quality that caters to multiple budgets. Made with a brand new M8 type of carbon fibre that’s found in Reglass’ windsurfing division, the S2000 has impressive tension resistance, making this pole stand out when in strong winds, or throughout harsh battles with hard-fighting fish. Our Reglass partners have given this model the same top-quality manufacturing essences that are now a staple with our poles, incorporating the very best of European technology and exclusive features within each section to provide an exceptional performance every time, including the added Teflon joints, removing carbon-to-carbon wear and increasing the longevity of the pole. We’ve ensured this pole is built on our standard 22mm mandrel to make interchanging within our current ranges painless, and guaranteeing that previous poles, including Signature Pro, Oculus, and Definition models also follow suit. The S2000 sits at 16m at its longest range and is supplied with plenty of additional carbon to make up the pole package. A total of six topkits, three Powerlite and three Commercial Power, for endless options, a cupping kit, and an added mini extension for the 16m section. Housed within a MV-R Tube Holdall, transporting this pole will be both safe and efficient. To provide peace of mind when in use, each pole comes with a customary 12-month warranty, covering any manufacturing faults that may occur. MV-R S2000 Standard Package: 1 x 16m Pole 1 x 16m Mini Extension 3 x R-Series Commercial Power topkits 3 x R-Series Powerlite topkits 1 x Cupping Kit ( R-Series ) 1 x MV-R Tube Holdall

title: MAVER MV-R S3000 POLE PACKAGE 16m
description: With recent developments in carbon fibre technology, we at Maver pride ourselves on bringing you the very best, especially when it comes to poles. With our upgrades to the RXX and RXS models, we decided it’s time to produce a complete range that offers incredible quality that caters to multiple budgets. A new M8 carbon type is the heart of the S3000, with this carbon fibre being found in Reglass’ windsurfing division, boasting impressive resistance to added tension, whether it be strong winds or hard-fighting fish – this pole can handle it all with ease. The very best of European science has been fused into this model, thanks to our partners at Reglass, with our exclusive resins and patented finishes being included. Our famous ‘Nanolith’ technology bonds honeycomb metal fibres to the outer surface, increasing wall-strength to help withstand the pressures of today’s fishing scene. To make this pole available to anglers everywhere, we’ve made sure interchangeability is effortless by creating this model on our 22mm mandrel. For those owning a pole from our current range, or any pole from previous years including Signature, Oculus, and Definition models, upgrading to the S3000 is made as easy as possible. A stellar pole package is combined with this exceptional pole, offering all new owners with a substantial number of extras. A grand total of 8 topkits, a cupping kit, an additional long number 4 section, plus a short number 4 section, and even a mini extension, which all come housed in an MV-R Tube Holdall for safe keeping. To provide peace of mind when in use, each pole comes with a customary 12-month warranty, covering any manufacturing faults that may occur. MV-R S3000 Standard Package: 1 x 16m Pole 1 x 16m Mini Extension 4 x R-Series Commercial Power topkits 4 x R-Series Powerlite topkits 1 x R-Series Long No.4 Section 1 x R-Series Short No.4 Section 1 x Cupping Kit ( R-Series ) 1 x MV-R Tube Holdall

title: MAVER MV-R ELITE 10M POLE PACKAGE ( 3 Kits plus Pole Protection Case )
description: A brand new addition into our impressive pole range comes the MV-R Elite pole. Only 10m in length and manufactured from top-quality carbon fibre, this pole makes a great newcomer pole for adults and juniors alike, but also perfect for those not wanting a full length pole. Still consisting of the same quality as our current poles, it's all just packed into this smaller beauty that's ideal for today's commercial waters. Alongside this pole, a generous pole package is supplied, providing any new owner with a sufficient number of topkits to cover multiple situations. What we have yet to mention is that this pole will come housed in a Pole Protection Case absolutely free of charge, so you can ensure that your precious carbon won't get damaged. Package including: 3 x Power Kits 1 x Cupping Kit 1 x Pole Protection Case (Stock Code:N1580)

The lure’s natural wobbling action simulates a distressed baitfish, triggering predatory strikes. Durable construction ensures long-lasting performance in various water conditions.
