title: Mikado Bixlite Jerk Spin Lure Fishing Rod – 1.95 m / 20-60 g Casting Weight
description: Mikado Bixlite Jerk Spin – 1.95 m / 20-60 g The Mikado Bixlite Jerk Spin is a short, compact rod designed for jerkbait fishing using a classic reel. At 1.95 m with a 20-60 g casting range, it delivers excellent control and responsiveness when working heavier lures. The fast, dynamic blank allows you to cast heavy jerkbaits and impart precise action, while the reserve of power in the butt section guarantees reliable hauling in all conditions. Specifications: Length: 1.95 m Transport Length: 101 cm Weight: 167 g Casting Weight: 20-60 g Sections: 2 Action: Fast Material: High-modulus carbon How to Use: Ideal for casting near structure or along weed lines where predators lie in wait. Pair with jerkbaits or larger hard lures within the 20-60 g range. Use short, sharp rod jerks to create erratic lure movement, followed by brief pauses to mimic injured prey. Keep your rod tip angled slightly down and be prepared for aggressive takes.

title: Cast & Catch Fishing Gift Box - Small Beginner Gift Box
description: Hook a smile with the perfect gift for aspiring anglers! Our Small Beginners Cast & Catch Gift Box is thoughtfully packed with essential fishing gear, fun accessories, and a touch of angler inspiration - everything needed to start a lifetime passion for fishing adventures. Whether it’s their first cast or a weekend on the water with family, this fishing tackle gift box makes it easy to reel in excitement. Perfect for kids, teens, or anyone new to the sport, it’s a ready-to-go package that sparks curiosity, builds confidence, and makes every catch memorable. The small Cast & Catch Beginners gift box holds: 1x Maver clear waggler float 1x Maver wooden waggler float 1x Spool of Kamasan line 1x pack of hooks 1x pack of Maver split shot 1x hook disgorger 1x bag of Fjuka Fatboy hook bait 1x Voyagers Hook Fishing Company sticker Unwrap Adventure Carefully prepared for you by Voyagers Hook Fishing Company, this collection brings together essentials and small treasures that honour the spirit of time spent on the water. Each piece has been thoughtfully chosen to inspire calm, reflection, and connection - to nature, and to yourself. Fishing is more than a pastime. It’s a way to slow down, to listen, and to find clarity in the rhythm of the cast and the quiet between moments. Out there, surrounded by water and sky, we remember what balance feels like. This box is a celebration of that stillness - a reminder that the best gifts are not just received, but experienced. May it bring you a sense of peace, adventure, and gratitude for the simple beauty of time spent outdoors.

Our Large Beginners Cast & Catch Gift Box is thoughtfully packed with essential fishing gear, fun accessories, and a touch of angler inspiration - everything needed to start a lifetime passion for fishing adventures. Whether it’s their first cast or a weekend on the water with family, this fishing tackle gift box makes it easy to reel in excitement. Perfect for kids, teens, or anyone new to the sport, it’s a ready-to-go package that sparks curiosity, builds confidence, and makes every catch memorable. The Large Cast & Catch Beginners gift box holds: 2x Maver clear waggler float 1x Maver wooden waggler float 1x Spool of Kamasan line 2x pack of hooks 1x pack of Maver split shot 1x hook disgorger 1x plummet 1x Medium Saber tackle box to keep it all in. 2x feeders 1x Voyagers Hook Fishing Company sticker Unwrap Adventure Carefully prepared for you by Voyagers Hook Fishing Company, this collection brings together essentials and small treasures that honour the spirit of time spent on the water. Each piece has been thoughtfully chosen to inspire calm, reflection, and connection - to nature, and to yourself. Fishing is more than a pastime. It’s a way to slow down, to listen, and to find clarity in the rhythm of the cast and the quiet between moments. Out there, surrounded by water and sky, we remember what balance feels like. This box is a celebration of that stillness - a reminder that the best gifts are not just received, but experienced. May it bring you a sense of peace, adventure, and gratitude for the simple beauty of time spent outdoors.

title: Kamasan Premium Snap Tackle Pike Fishing Trace Semi Barbed
description: Super quality twin treble rigs/snap tackle for Pike dead bait fishing. Each rig is manufactured with high-quality components such as kink-resistant long-lasting wire and very sharp, strong barbed trebles. Designed to fish dead bait for Pike each trace can be used numerous times. If you’ve never used a Kamasan snap tackle before you’ll find that each wire leader has two barbed treble hooks that not only provide a secure hold on the target species but are also useful for securing dead bait in place. Top tip; For longer casts try securing dead baits to the trace with bait elastic to prevent them from coming unstuck. Kamasan Premium Snap Tackle High-quality snap tackle Designed to target pike with dead baits Kink resistant wire Long life construction Length approx 2 strong barbed trebles per trace 1 rig per pack Size 4 hooks on 30lb trace Semi Barbed Size 6 hooks on 25lb trace Semi Barbed
tags: pike fishing, dead baiting, pike, river, lake, fishing, angling, tackle

title: KODEX Cigar Slider Pike Fishing Float Medium 8g
description: KODEX Cigar Slider Pike Float – Medium 8g The KODEX Cigar Slider Pike Float is built for precision and strength, giving pike anglers total control in any condition. Its streamlined cigar shape ensures excellent stability and minimal drift, while the 8g medium weight offers perfect balance for live or dead bait setups. A screw-in swivel base lets you easily switch between slider and bottom-end configurations, making it as versatile as it is reliable. Tough, sensitive, and ready for action — ideal for serious predator fishing.

title: Dinsmores Syndicate Pike Fishing Inline Float - All Sizes
description: The Dinsmores Syndicate Pike Inline Float combines simplicity and performance for serious pike anglers. With a streamlined inline-through construction, it offers effortless rigging and natural bait presentation. The 15 g weight ensures good casting distance and stable placement, while the high-vis orange top makes keeps your bite indication clean and unmistakable. Ideal for dead-bait setups targeting large pike in still or running water. Available in 15g, 20g and 25g

title: Dinsmore Syndicate Pike Fishing Drifter Float + Trace Kit 30g
description: The Dinsmores Syndicate Pike Drifter Float Kit 30 g is a ready‑to‑use rig designed for predator (specifically pike) float fishing in drift conditions. It features a 30 g drifter float to maintain stable presentation in mild current or wind‑drift scenarios. Included in the kit are float stops, an egg weight or similar ballast for depth control, and a semi‑barbed two‑hook snap trace, enabling the angler to present dead or live bait naturally. The configuration allows you to drift baited rigs in a controlled manner and reach water that may be inaccessible by standard casting.
tags: pike fishing, pike, tackle, fishing, angling, winter fishing, dinsmore

The configuration allows you to drift baited rigs in a controlled manner and reach water that may be inaccessible by standard casting. /floats/pike-floats, /pike-fishing/pike-floats pike fishing, pike, tackle, fishing, angling, winter fishing, dinsmore Dinsmore coarse, predator float

title: Cling Mag Grab Fishing Rod Holder Rack - All Colours
description: New from Cling Fishing, introducing the Mag Grab Rod Rack.  The Rod Rack is a two-part system designed to hold your fly rod securely during fly changes, fish releases, snack time, and any other situation where you might need to set your rod down for a minute. The base plate securely attaches to the butt of your rod with a strong rubber clasp, while the top magnet is easily attached to your waders, pack, or vest. Get them close, and click, your rod is secure.  The Rod Rack also features a line threading feature that magnetically holds your flies (even small ones!) on a groove to make threading the eye quick and easy. An eye cleaning needle is available to clear clogged hook eyes, and a hook keeper feature gives you a convenient spot to attach your flies, lures and hooks. Not just for fly fishing, can be used for your lure rod, travel rod etc. if you need to free up your hands this is the gadget for you. Mag Grab Rod Rack design is Patent Pending. What's Included?  1 Rod Mount 1 docking station 2 O-rings for secure attachment 1 6" lanyard Available in dark green, orange, blue or black

title: Cling Mag Grab Doublestack Magnetic Tool Fly Hook Holder - Birds Eye
description: New from Cling is the Mag Grab Doublestack - originally designed as a name badge for trade shows and fly shop employees, now available to all. The Doublestack features our same incredible holding strength as the rest of our Mag Grab series, but in a functional new design. The smaller size is perfect for wader straps, narrow spaces, and those spots where another size might be too big.  Product Information The Mag Grab is a magnetic fly patch made from an anodized aircraft grade aluminum alloy that will stand up to years of use. Its fully machined and milled aluminum housing holds an extremely strong, rare-earth neodymium magnet which was specially chosen to be delicate enough so flies can be easily removed, yet strong enough to hold pliers, forceps, knives, or just about any tool you can imagine. On top of that the stainless steel plate is a high grade stainless steel alloy that holds firmly onto the magnet, but will still resist corrosion, and last for many years to come. The Mag Grab truly sets the bar as the new standard for high quality fly fishing accessories and tools.  Dimensions:  1.5 x 3 inches 1.3 oz

title: SOG KeyTron UK Folding Key Chain Knife - UK EDC Legal Carry
description: SOG KeyTron UK – Compact Everyday Utility for Work, Outdoors & Fishing Designed for those who need a reliable cutting tool without the bulk, the SOG KeyTron UK is a compact, non-locking folding knife that sits neatly on your keyring and is always close at hand. Ideal for everyday carry, outdoor use, work tasks, and fishing , it offers practical performance in a lightweight, discreet design. The knife features a 4.7cm plain-edge clip point blade made from 5Cr15MoV stainless steel , providing good edge retention, corrosion resistance, and easy sharpening—well suited to wet or dirty environments such as waterside use or job sites. From trimming fishing line and cutting packaging to light campsite and utility tasks, the KeyTron is built to be genuinely useful. Its slim steel handle keeps weight to a minimum while remaining robust enough for daily use. The non-locking slip-joint mechanism allows for simple, safe operation, and a built-in bottle opener adds extra convenience for breaks outdoors or after a long day at work. The integrated keyring with quick-release latch ensures the knife stays secure but instantly accessible. Made exclusively for Heinnie Haynes® , the SOG KeyTron UK is Universal Knife Law Compliant , offering reassurance for responsible carry. Please note: this is the non-locking SlipTron version —SOG also produce a visually similar locking model, which differs in function. Compact, lightweight, and versatile, the SOG KeyTron UK is an excellent choice for anglers, workers, and outdoor enthusiasts who want a dependable tool that goes wherever they do. title: Antonini Old Bear Walnut Stainless Folding  Locking Knife - All Sizes
description: Antonini Old Bear Walnut – Timeless Utility, Crafted in Italy Created to celebrate Antonini’s 90th anniversary , the Old Bear Walnut series is a refined interpretation of the classic utility pocket knife. Rooted in tradition yet built for real-world use, it’s perfectly suited to everyday carry, outdoor tasks, work use, and fishing , where simplicity, reliability, and control matter most. The standout feature of the Old Bear is its beautifully finished walnut wood handle , offering a warm, natural feel in the hand and a timeless aesthetic that only improves with age. Paired with a clean, traditional drop-point blade , this knife excels at everyday cutting tasks—from trimming fishing line and preparing bait to campsite food prep and general utility work. A defining element of the design is the rotating ring lock , integrated into the brass collar . This patented mechanism—developed by Todesco of Maniago in 1985—securely locks the blade in both the open and closed positions, providing added confidence while maintaining the elegance of a traditional folder. With its straightforward handling, classic styling, and excellent value, the Antonini Old Bear Walnut is an attractive choice for those who appreciate heritage craftsmanship without sacrificing practicality. Made in Maniago, Italy , it reflects generations of knife-making expertise in a tool designed to be used and enjoyed every day. title: Nextool Multifunctional Camping Lantern – Compact Outdoor, Fishing & Garden Light
description: The Nextool Multifunctional Camping Lantern is the ultimate lighting companion for all your adventures. Featuring 3x LEDs at one end and a telescopic lantern with wings at the other , it provides versatile illumination for both general use and specific outdoor activities. Hang it from your tent, use it on a fishing trip, or bring it into your garden for a warm, reliable glow—its applications are virtually limitless. Built to last, the lantern is crafted from PA66+GF, ABS, and aluminum alloy , ensuring durability and longevity. Its rechargeable 21700 battery and long-lasting LEDs mean you'll never be left in the dark during outdoor expeditions, fishing evenings, or backyard tasks. With an IPX4 weatherproof rating , the lantern withstands splash and light rain, making it suitable for all conditions. Whether you’re camping, fishing, gardening, or handling emergency lighting, the Nextool Multifunctional Camping Lantern combines rugged construction, versatile illumination, and portable convenience into one essential tool. title: Maxpedition Tritium Key Ring With 2 Side Release Buckles.
description: The Tritium Key Ring is an easy way to consolidate, organize and deploy multiple sets of keys and key chain tools swell as light weight fishing kit like small nets and unhooking mats for example. This efficient device has three separate key rings joined by two 2cm side release buckles and can attach to your belt, on a tie-down loop in your Maxpedition bag, or you can just carry it in your pocket. You can also join multiple Tritium Key Rings to keep additional sets of keys or key chain tools together. title: Crafty Catcher Superfood Peanut Pro Boilies – 15 mm
description: Crafty Catcher Superfood Peanut Pro Boilies – 15 mm A true classic in carp bait history, Crafty Catcher Superfood Peanut Pro 15 mm boilies combine a time-tested recipe with modern superfood nutrition to deliver exceptional attraction and consistent performance on the bank. Crafted from a rich blend of peanut and tigernut meals , brewer’s yeast , betaine , milk powders and bird foods , then finished with blended nut oils and the original Peanut Pro flavour , these boilies emit a powerful, creamy nut-aroma that carp instinctively seek out. The 15 mm size makes these boilies ideal as both a hookbait and free offering , providing the perfect balance of visibility and palatability for all-season carp fishing. Whether cast out loose, used in PVA bags or presented on a hair rig, Peanut Pro boilies deliver attractor power and balanced nutrition that keeps fish feeding confidently. Key Features Premium peanut-based superfood boilies with intense nutty aroma. Balanced nutrient profile encourages carp to feed and hold in the swim. 15 mm diameter ideal for rig or free bait use. Shelf stable – no freezer required, ready to fish straight from the bag. A legendary bait choice with decades of proven results across UK and European waters. Give your angling sessions a competitive edge with Peanut Pro — a boilie that’s stood the test of time and remains a favourite among carp anglers worldwide.

title: Fjuka powerfully Thick Sensate Fish Accelerant - 100ml Red
description: NEW — Thickest-ever Sensate™ Fish Accelerant formula SENSATE™ — 8 high-powered attractants, stimulants & taste enhancers FISH ACCELERANT — works at a molecular level to release Sensate™ into the water, fast PLUS BLOCKER — neutralises fish-repellents (sweat, fuel, sunscreen) PVA FRIENDLY, 1000:1 CONCENTRATE THE FASTEST WAY to pull fish into your swim Precision attraction for faster catching. Powerfully thick Sensate™ Fish Accelerant sticks and stays on Method feeders, boilies, pellets, wafters and pop-ups — powering up all your favourite baits. Proven to release attractants into the water faster and spread further. Sustained release activates in seconds and lasts hours, focusing action on your bait and getting fish to bite. Scientific breakthrough. Contains Fish Accelerant — Fjuka’s exclusive micelle technology — increasing bioavailability of attractants and prolonging bites. How to use Dab or brush onto boilies, pop-ups, wafters, pellets or hookbaits until evenly coated. Use on Method paste and PVA bags — formulation is PVA friendly. For groundbaits and particles, mix to desired consistency; acts rapidly at low dilution (1000:1). Reapply as needed for extended sessions or after heavy swims. Why it works Thick, clingy formula ensures the Sensate™ plume forms close to your bait. Micelle-based Fish Accelerant releases attractants at a molecular level for faster dispersal and better uptake by fish. Plus Blocker neutralises human-sourced repellents so your scent trail doesn’t sabotage your session. Tips from the bank Use sparingly — a little goes a very long way at 1000:1 concentrate. Best when paired with matching hookbait flavours to create a consistent scent profile. Ideal for pressured waters where quick, focused attraction matters. Get fish into your swim. Fast. This is one of those products that once you try it, you won't go back. The thick formula clings to your hookbait far better than standard liquids and a little genuinely goes a very long way. At Voyagers Hook

title: Fjuka Sensate Accelerant Powder - 100g - All Flavours
description: SENSATE™ — THE FASTEST WAY TO PULL FISH INTO YOUR SWIM A proven cocktail of 8 fish attractants, stimulants, and taste enhancers combined with Fjuka’s cutting-edge micelle tech for serious bite extension. SENSATE™ is engineered to deliver billions of quick-release attractant micelles in every drop, instantly ramping up the appeal of your baits. Key features Fish Accelerant: Instantly disperses SENSATE™ attractants on impact so your swim wakes up the instant your bait hits the water. Micelle-powered Bioavailability: Fjuka’s exclusive micelle technology increases attractant uptake and keeps fish feeding longer. Plus Blocker: Neutralizes common fish repellents—sweat, fuel, sunscreen—so your bait stays irresistible. Billions per Drop: Ultra-fine, quick-release attractant particles spread fast and wide. 1000:1 Concentrate: Super-potent — a little goes a very long way. Form Options: Sweet, Sweet Dark, Natural, and Halibut — choose the profile that matches your venue and target species. Powder Form: Spreads more evenly through groundbaits and pastes than liquids. Ideal for maggots, pellets, meat, corn, boilies, spod mixes and more. PVA Safe: Completely PVA bag-friendly. Subtle Color: Lightly colors baits without heavy dyeing. Power up maggots or chopped baits with a light dusting for instant appeal. Use in PVA bags without concern—powder remains fully compatible. title: Mikado Jaws Bait Finesse cast Fishing Rod 193cm c.w. 1-5g (2 sec.) - 1 pcs.
description: Super-light, ultra-sensitive casting rod built for the tiniest artificial lures — because sometimes the littlest bait brings the biggest bragging rights. Finished with a carbon baitcasting seat and Fuji “O” guides for buttery line flow and pinpoint lure control. Ideal for stalking perch, chub, and trout in narrow streams, small rivers and canals where stealth and finesse win the day. Equally at home on the rocks looking for wrass. Specs Length: 193 cm Transport length: 100 cm Sections: 2 Weight: 78 g Casting weight: 1–5 g Tip: Tube Qty in package: 1 Why you’ll love it Featherweight design: At 78 g this rod won’t tire your arm during long, patient hours of gentle lure work. Hyper-sensitive blank: Every tick, peck, and pick-up registers through the rod so you can set the hook with confidence. Precision casting: Optimized for 1–5 g lures — perfect for micro-jigs, tiny spinners, and slim soft plastics. Compact travel length: 100 cm transport size makes it a breeze to carry on hikes or tuck into your car trunk. Quality components: Carbon baitcasting seat plus Fuji “O” guides for dependable performance and smooth casts. Perfect for anglers who prefer subtle presentations, backwater meanders, and sipping coffee while watching the line. Small lure specialist — big-smile potential.
